data.title: Polymarket has added a prediction event for "Will Trump Mobile release a phone by the end of April or June?"
data.description: According to Odaily Seer, Polymarket has added a prediction event for whether Trump Mobile will release a phone by the end of April or June. Currently, the probability of a release before April 30th is 6%, and the probability of a release before June 30th is 22%. According to the rules, if Trump Mobile officially releases a phone (including the T1 or any other model) before the specified date (11:59 PM Eastern Time), the market will mark it as "yes"; otherwise, it will mark it as "no." The product must be available to the public for purchase within the specified time to be considered released; announcements, unveilings, pre-orders, or reservations are not sufficient. The market's primary basis for judgment is information provided by Trump Mobile, but it also considers consensus from other reliable reports. In December 2025, Trump Mobile, owned by the Trump Organization, postponed its planned delivery of its gold smartphone by the end of 2025; on January 24, 2026, The Verge published a blog post reporting that the original T1 phone had not yet shipped. Similar to the Trump Organization's previous brand licensing practices, the T1 phone and services are not directly designed, developed, or sold by the Trump Organization, but rather licensed to a third-party company. Odaily Seer continues to monitor and predict the market, seeing changes before pricing.

data.title: Spot gold broke through $4,760 per ounce, rising 2% on the day.
data.description: According to Gate data, spot gold rose 2.00% on the day, currently trading at $4760.61 per ounce. Spot silver is currently priced at $75.259, up 0.13% on the day; Brent crude is at $99.86, down 2.22% on the day; and WTI crude is at $98.870, down 2.87% on the day.

data.title: Ethereum Foundation researchers have proposed a validator revenue redistribution scheme to support the targeted use of staking rewards to fund public goods.
data.description: According to Odaily Planet Daily, Ethereum Foundation researcher Devansh Mehta proposed a validator income redistribution scheme at the EthCC conference. The scheme proposes allowing validators to signal at the consensus layer that they can independently decide to redirect a certain percentage of their staking rewards to a designated smart contract, instead of withdrawing all of it to their personal wallets. The recipients could be public goods financing platforms such as Gitcoin and Octant, security auditing firms, or the core protocol research team. This scheme involves two execution-layer changes: the signaling of the validator redirection percentage, and the logic implementation of fund allocation to the designated contract.

data.title: Franklin Templeton will launch its crypto division, "Franklin Crypto," primarily targeting pension funds and sovereign wealth funds.
data.description: Franklin Templeton announced today that it will acquire 250 Capital, a spin-off of CoinFund, to accelerate its expansion in the digital asset space. 250 Capital is a company spun off from CoinFund. Following the acquisition, Franklin Templeton will reportedly launch a crypto division focused on serving pension funds and sovereign wealth funds, named "Franklin Crypto". (CoinDesk)

data.title: Ethereum Foundation Proposes Validator Revenue Redistribution Plan
data.description:
Ethereum Foundation researcher Devansh Mehta introduced a Validator Revenue Redistribution (VRR) plan at the EthCC[9] conference. According to Foresight News, this proposal allows validators to signal at the consensus layer to autonomously redirect a portion of their staking rewards to designated smart contracts instead of withdrawing all to personal wallets. The recipients could include public goods funding platforms like Gitcoin and Octant, security audit organizations, or core protocol research teams.

The plan involves two changes at the execution layer: signaling the validator's redirection percentage and implementing the logic for fund allocation to specified contracts. Devansh emphasized that VRR is not mandatory but serves as a tool empowering validators to convert part of their earnings into a funding source for Ethereum's evolution. This approach aims to reduce reliance on centralized donations while enabling validators to directly participate in ecosystem governance and security development.

data.title: Iranian Confidence in Government Amid Foreign Tensions
data.description: Hossein Hazrati expressed on April 1 that the Iranian populace remains steadfast in their support for the military and government despite external threats. According to NS3.AI, Hazrati criticized U.S. President Donald Trump for relying on flawed analysis and underestimating Iran's potential reaction to minor military provocations.

data.title: Justin Sun Transfers 2.01 Million USDT to Anonymous Address
data.description: Justin Sun has transferred 2.01 million USDT to an anonymous address, according to ChainCatcher. The transaction occurred at 19:05, with the funds moving to an address beginning with 0xB854.

data.title: Brazil's B3 to Launch Bitcoin-Linked Event Contracts for Professional Investors
data.description: Brazil's B3 is set to introduce six event contracts on April 27, targeting professional investors with bitcoin-linked products. According to NS3.AI, these cash-settled contracts will encompass mini futures and spot prices for bitcoin, the U.S. dollar, and the Ibovespa index, with pricing reaching up to 100 reals ($19). B3 has confirmed that these products are regulated by the CVM, and eligibility to trade is restricted to investors possessing assets exceeding 10 million reals or holding CVM certification.

data.title: BlackRock to Launch iShares Bitcoin Premium ETF with Ticker BITA
data.description:
On April 1, Bloomberg ETF analyst Eric Balchunas revealed that BlackRock is set to introduce the iShares Bitcoin Premium ETF, which will trade under the ticker BITA. According to BlockBeats, this new offering follows the anticipated iShares Spot Bitcoin ETF, IBIT, although the management fee for BITA has not yet been disclosed, with expectations set at 38 basis points.

The iShares Bitcoin Premium ETF will employ a covered call strategy. Unlike traditional spot ETFs that passively track Bitcoin prices, this fund will hold Bitcoin while selling covered call options to earn premiums. The generated income will be distributed to investors, effectively converting Bitcoin's volatility into investment returns.

data.title: Binance Launches Perle Trading Competition with Token Rewards
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, the platform is set to launch the Perle Trading Competition on Binance Alpha, offering exclusive token rewards to participants. The competition will be divided into two promotion periods: the first from 2026-04-01 13:00 (UTC) to 2026-04-08 13:00 (UTC), and the second from 2026-04-08 13:00 (UTC) to 2026-04-15 13:00 (UTC). Participants will be ranked based on their total purchase volume of Perle (PRL) tokens during each period. The top 3,330 users by purchase volume will share 799,200 PRL tokens equally, with each eligible user receiving 240 PRL tokens. Only trades executed via Binance Wallet (Keyless) or Binance Alpha will qualify, excluding third-party dApp transactions. Notably, there is no cap on trading volume for participants, but token bridging transactions are not eligible.

Reward distribution will follow the outlined rules, with token rewards claimable in PRL tokens by eligible users before 2026-04-29 13:00:00 (UTC). Users must complete the claim within 14 days after rewards become claimable, or they will be forfeited. Eligible winners can view and claim their rewards directly via their Binance Alpha accounts or Binance Wallet (Keyless). To participate, users must click [Join] on the Binance App event page, ensuring their trading volume is counted. Participants are required to update their Binance App to the latest version and create a Binance Wallet (Keyless). Binance reserves the right to amend or vary the terms of the activity without prior notice, including canceling or extending the promotion. Only users with active Binance accounts are eligible, and tokens will not be distributed to those who delete or deactivate their accounts.

data.title: U.S. mortgage rates rise to highest level since August of last year.
data.description: U.S. mortgage rates rose for the fourth straight week, reaching their highest level since August of last year, dampening refinancing and homebuying activity. Data released Wednesday by the Mortgage Bankers Association showed that the 30-year mortgage contract rate rose 14 basis points to 6.57% in the week ending March 27. Over the past four weeks, the rate has risen by nearly 0.5 percentage points, the largest increase since 2024. The association's mortgage application index fell for the second straight week, while its refinancing index declined further by 17.3%. Mortgage rates, which are linked to U.S. Treasury yields, surged after concerns about rising inflation arose following the Iran war. Lower borrowing costs at the beginning of the year had provided support for the weak housing market, but that support has largely faded. (Jinshi)

data.title: Iranian official: The Iranian people will not remain silent in the face of aggression.
data.description: According to Iranian sources on April 1, Hazrati, head of the Iranian government's Information Committee, stated that despite internal divisions, difficulties, and problems, the Iranian people will not remain silent in the face of foreign aggression, and they have full confidence in the military and government. Hazrati said that US President Trump was misled by flawed analysis, believing that Iran could be "easily dealt with" and that a small-scale attack could completely destroy the country. "But he doesn't know that everyone in our country is loyal to Iran." Hazrati said, "The enemy has failed to achieve its objectives and is instead facing a crisis." (CCTV News)

data.title: Bitcoin Put Options Show Stronger Downside Hedging Compared to Ether
data.description: Bitcoin put options are currently more expensive than those for ether across various maturities, indicating a stronger demand for downside protection in Bitcoin. According to NS3.AI, this trend emerges even as ether experienced a 5% increase over the past 24 hours. While longer-dated ether options exhibit only slight bearishness, comparable bitcoin contracts demand a higher premium for protection, reflecting a more cautious sentiment among investors towards Bitcoin.

data.title: U.S. Mortgage Rates Reach Highest Level Since August, Impacting Housing Activity
data.description: U.S. mortgage rates have risen for the fourth consecutive week, reaching their highest level since August of last year, according to Jin10. The Mortgage Bankers Association reported on Wednesday that the 30-year mortgage contract rate increased by 14 basis points to 6.57% for the week ending March 27. Over the past four weeks, this rate has climbed nearly 0.5 percentage points, marking the largest increase since 2024. The association's index for home purchase mortgage applications declined for the second week in a row, while the refinancing index fell by 17.3%. Mortgage rates, which are linked to U.S. Treasury yields, surged following inflation concerns triggered by the war in Iran. Earlier in the year, lower borrowing costs had supported the struggling real estate market, but this benefit has largely dissipated.

data.title: Block's Layoffs: AI to Replace Middle Management, Says Jack Dorsey
data.description: Jack Dorsey has clarified that Block's recent layoffs of approximately 4,000 employees are part of a permanent restructuring strategy aimed at replacing middle management with artificial intelligence, rather than a mere cost-cutting measure. According to NS3.AI, Dorsey, along with Sequoia Capital managing partner Roelof Botha, emphasized that AI-driven models for internal and customer operations could assume coordination tasks traditionally managed by human supervisors. However, current and former Block employees have expressed concerns to the Guardian, noting that around 95% of AI-generated code changes still require human intervention. Additionally, these employees highlighted that AI tools are not yet capable of handling regulated banking and money-transfer responsibilities.

data.title: Saudi Arabia's Oil Exports Halve in March Due to Hormuz Strait Closure
data.description: Saudi Arabia experienced a significant drop in oil exports in March, with a 50% decrease attributed to the closure of the Hormuz Strait by Iran. According to Odaily, this development has raised concerns about the stability of oil supply routes in the region. The Hormuz Strait is a critical passage for global oil shipments, and its closure has had a substantial impact on Saudi Arabia's export capabilities.

data.title: Franklin Templeton Expands Digital Asset Strategy with Acquisition
data.description: Franklin Templeton has agreed to acquire a company spun off from CoinFund as part of its digital asset expansion strategy. According to Foresight News, this new cryptocurrency strategy is aimed at institutional investors.

data.description: Saudi Arabia's oil exports fell by 50% in March due to Iran's closure of the Strait of Hormuz. (Jinshi)

data.title: A major whale has purchased another 21,000 ETH from Binance, bringing its total holdings to $53.28 million worth of ETH.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a whale has once again purchased 21,000 ETH from Binance, worth $44.74 million, and now holds a total of 25,000 ETH, worth $53.28 million.

data.description: Franklin Templeton has agreed to acquire CoinFund's spin-off as part of its digital asset expansion and to launch new crypto strategies targeting institutional investors. (Solid Intel)
